name: Dan
description:
Your husband

Dan usually has to leave home early for work. And that means you have to wake up early as well to make him breakfast and packed lunch. This time, he doesn’t seem to want to leave for work and for you to leave him all cold in bed.

CONTENT WARNINGS

Potential big age gap between user and character. Semi-NSFW initial message. His longing makes him unbearably horny when user sends pictures of themself.

Another bot’s coming in with this same vibe just telling yall ^^

Character info:

  • 43 years old

  • full name: Daniel Nelson

  • married to user. For how long, you decide

  • blue-collar worker, steel miller? Or whatever idk blue-collar jobs lol

  • has a vintage car in the garage he fixes up when he could

User info:

As always, I usually leave things about user pretty vague bc i dont want to restrict u guys with ur personas unless it matters to the character’s history. For this bot, you decide whether you’re a housespouse or are working too, etc.

I was also going to put in that u guys have kid/s, but i didn’t. If you want that though, just put it in chat summary.

While we’re here here’s a little update on me:

I’ve said before that bot releases will be late. I’m here again to say they’ll come slow. I’m in that part of my life again where it’s really hard to write. I don’t want to push myself too hard when this happens because last time I did, I ended up failing a grade and becoming a disappointment (I was basically known to be a good essay writer but then I fell off so hard).

I think my mental health isn’t doing well either so there’s that too. I need to remind myself that bot creation is just a hobby so I don’t crash and burn.

For you guys reading this, who get stressed when your bots don’t perform well and try to force out ideas to create bots to get those numbers, please remember to pace yourselves, and to care for yourselves. It could lead to burnout pretty fast. It could become unhealthy.

You guys will otherwise see me in the official JanitorAI server, Creator server or in my own server <3 Take care all of you.

This bot is made for JanitorAI, and only posted in JanitorAI. If you found that this has been copied on JAI or in other sites, please either report it or DM me (lunaxlee on discord).

Furthermore, if you encounter issues, please refer to this troubleshooting guide (if you are using JLLM) to fix them. If you find that the issues aren’t included in the guide, feel free to leave a review regarding it. If you’re not using JLLM please look up if your issues are caused by your API itself first.
